## User impact

## Privacy and security

- [ ] No real health data, pairing artifacts, credentials, databases, or unredacted logs are included.
- [ ] Data-flow, permission, storage, and model-provider implications are documented.
- [ ] The change does not add medical diagnosis, prescriptions, or unsupported health claims.

## Validation

- [ ] Typecheck/build completed.
- [ ] Relevant automated tests completed.
- [ ] `npm run audit:oss` completed from a full clone when release scope changed.
- [ ] User-visible changes are documented in `CHANGELOG.md`.
